plugins.name: production-grade
plugins.description: 14 AI agents from idea to production-ready SaaS. 4 engagement modes, scale-driven architecture, quality-first parallelism, Polymath co-pilot, brownfield-safe. Includes: PM, Architect, Backend, Frontend, QA, Security, Code Review, DevOps, SRE, Data Scientist, Technical Writer, Skill Maker — all bundled.
